XAdminLaravel Admin Panel Builder

Modern admin panel builder based on Livewire v4 and Tailwind CSS

Quick Start
View on GitHub
⚡

Livewire v4 Powered

Build responsive interfaces with pure PHP, no JavaScript required

🎨

Tailwind CSS

Modern UI design, perfectly integrated with Laravel ecosystem

🔒

Type Safe

PHP 8.3+ strict type checking, PHPStan Level 9

🧪

Testing First

Pest + Testbench, comprehensive test coverage

🚀

Laravel 12

Fully compatible with the latest Laravel version

📦

Out of the Box

Grid, Form, Auth, quickly build CRUD operations
